name: tattoo-foundation-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for the TATTOO Foundation. Exposes information about the Foundation's programs, grants (including the Blue-Collar AI Access Program), the safelist database, and resources for drivers and partner agents.
notes: Endpoints above are reserved subdomains. The MCP server is being implemented; until it ships, agents should use the static context at https://tattoo.foundation/llm.txt.
